name: D3rlord3 & Avery — POLYCULE
description:
COLLEGE AU — MOVING DAY ♥︎

Moving in with your two new roommates.

  • slimeknight polycule.

  • college au.

  • nothing bad ever happens because i'd rather die than write angst.

  • human forms, entirely based on headcanons.

  • "d3rlord3 has autism" headcanon.

  • they are both 20 years old, and either in their 1st year or 2nd year of college.
creator: neediness
